import React from 'react'; import { scrollToSection, COMPANY_INFO } from '../utils'; import { Button } from './ui'; const Hero = () => { return (
{/* Decorative Elements */}
{/* Left Column */}
{/* Eyebrow */}
Secure Will Storage
{/* Title */}

Protect Your Legacy

{/* Right Column */}

Professional, secure storage for your will and essential estate documents. Ensure your loved ones can find them when needed most.

{/* Actions */}
{/* Card Image */}
{/* Stats */}
100%
Secure
24/7
Protected
${COMPANY_INFO.price}
Per Year
); }; export default Hero;
